description: The UI transitions from the browser view to a dark overlay with screen sharing instructions.
frame_description: A dark overlay appears over the browser window with text instructions.

description: The instruction text updates to confirm that screen sharing is being initiated.
frame_description: Text on screen changes from sharing instructions to a confirmation message.

description: The task description appears on the screen, instructing the user to book a return domestic flight within Australia.
frame_description: A block of text containing the user's task appears in the center of the screen.

description: The task description expands with more details about using the Flight Centre website.
frame_description: Additional lines of text are added to the task description.

description: The screen transitions to black, indicating a navigation or page load is occurring.
frame_description: The screen goes completely dark, typical of a page transition.

description: User dwells on the instructions page, reading the task details as they are revealed.
frame_description: A dark overlay displays instructions for a flight booking task.

description: The task instructions are progressively revealed on the screen.
Scroll E (magnitude: 6.8, uniformity: 0.80)
User selects 'Melbourne, Australia' from the destination dropdown menu
page_title: Flight Centre | Your centre for travel.

description: User pauses to examine the date picker calendar for February 2026
page_title: Flight Centre | Your centre for travel.

description: A loading spinner appears on the screen while flight results are being fetched.
frame_description: Loading screen with text 'Our overhead compartments are stuffed with deals!'

description: The loading screen transitions to the flight results page.
frame_description: Transition from loading screen to results page with airline filters.

description: Cursor is positioned near the 'Jetstar' airline filter checkbox.
frame_description: Flight results page showing airline filters.

description: User clicked on the 6:10am Virgin Australia flight to expand it and view available fare types.
frame_description: The user transitions from viewing a list of flight options to viewing specific fare details for a selected Virgin Australia flight.

description: User scrolls down the page to view more return flight options.
frame_description: The user scrolls down the list of available return flights from Melbourne to Adelaide, moving the departing flight summary off-screen to reveal more flight times.

description: User scrolls down the list of return flights to view more options.
frame_description: The page content moves upwards, revealing later flight times.

description: User continues scrolling down the list of return flights.
frame_description: The page scrolls further down, showing flights in the early afternoon.

description: User scrolls further down to see mid-afternoon flight options.
frame_description: Flights from 1:20pm to 4:20pm become visible.

description: User scrolls down to the bottom of the visible flight list.
frame_description: Evening flights around 5:20pm and 6:20pm are displayed.

description: User scrolls back up the list towards the earlier flight options.
frame_description: The page content moves downwards, returning to the morning flights.

description: User pauses on the morning flight options, likely reviewing the 9:10am and 10:10am flights.
frame_description: The screen remains static on the top of the flight results list.

description: The page transitions from the loading screen to the 'Review trip' page.
frame_description: The 'All Set!' loading screen disappears and the flight review page loads.

description: User pauses to review the departing flight details on the 'Review trip' page.
frame_description: The cursor rests over the flight information area while the user reads.

description: User scrolls down the page to view the 'Add-ons' and 'Baggage' sections.
frame_description: The view shifts downwards, revealing the baggage information under the 'Add-ons' header.

description: User scrolls further down the page to reveal the 'Seats' selection section.
frame_description: The page content moves up, bringing the 'Seats' section into view.

description: The passenger details page finishes loading, displaying the 'Travellers' section and flight summary.
The price summary section loads in the right-hand sidebar.
The traveller details form fields (Title, First name, Last name) appear, replacing skeleton loaders.
The browser navigates from the Flight Centre booking flow to an Askable session page.
The user hovers the cursor over the 'Repeat the task instructions' button on the Askable overlay.
The text on the Askable overlay changes from a hesitation prompt to a thank you message.
